nasb.text: “Whatever I command you, you shall be careful to do; you shall not add to nor take away from it.

esv.text: “Everything that I command you, you shall be careful to do. You shall not add to it or take from it.

cnv.text: “我吩咐你們的一切話，你們都要謹守遵行，不可加添，也不可減少。”

ccb.text: “你们要谨遵我的一切吩咐，不可增添，也不可删减。
